steps.title: Use indirect-question order
steps.content: After "why," the blank completes an embedded question inside a declarative sentence. That structure needs normal subject-verb order and a period, because the sentence states what scientists have figured out rather than asking a direct question.

steps.title: Reject direct-question forms
steps.content: Choices A and D use inverted order, which fits a direct question but not an embedded one. Choice B has the right word order, but its question mark wrongly turns the whole sentence into a question. The remaining choice uses normal word order and a period. The answer is C.
